explanations.16: The regex pattern searches for the word FROM followed by whitespace and captures whatever comes after it; group(1) gets that captured part.
explanations.18: strip() removes any extra whitespace from the beginning and end of the matched parent image name.
explanations.23: This chains two .get() calls: first it safely gets the 'services' dictionary (or an empty dict if missing), then from that result it gets the 'docs' service.
explanations.25: This line splits the volume string on colons to extract just the host path, but only if a colon exists; otherwise it uses the whole string.
explanations.32: The stroke-dasharray: 5 5 creates a dashed border line with a pattern of 5 pixels solid, 5 pixels gap.
explanations.50: The f-string inside the regular string won't actually interpolate; the mermaid content is static because the f was on line 38, not here.
